GL_JE_HEADERS.table_comment: Oracle Fusion GL journal header (canonical EBS-style name). One row per journal entry header within a batch (GL_JE_BATCHES -> GL_JE_HEADERS -> GL_JE_LINES). Scoped by LEDGER_ID. Trial balance and financials use POSTED journals only (STATUS = 'P'). NOTE: under BICC/FDI the physical object is named differently (e.g. JournalSourceExtractPVO) — see the <customer>-oracle-fusion-glossary physical->canonical mapping.

columns.JE_HEADER_ID: Primary key of the journal header. Join target for GL_JE_LINES.JE_HEADER_ID.
columns.LEDGER_ID: FK to GL_LEDGERS. Always scope GL queries by ledger — different ledgers have different currency/calendar/COA.
columns.JE_BATCH_ID: FK to GL_JE_BATCHES (the posting batch this header belongs to).
columns.PERIOD_NAME: Accounting period (FK to GL_PERIODS). Drives the books, not the entry date. Sort by effective period number, never alphabetically by this string.
columns.STATUS: Posting status. 'P' = posted, 'U' = unposted. Trial balance / actuals use posted only.
columns.ACTUAL_FLAG: 'A' = actual, 'B' = budget, 'E' = encumbrance. Filter to 'A' for actuals.
columns.JE_SOURCE: Originating source (Manual, Payables, Receivables, Cost Management...). Subledger sources roll up from XLA — don't double-count against XLA detail.
columns.CURRENCY_CODE: Document (entered) currency of the journal. Never sum ENTERED amounts across differing CURRENCY_CODE values; use accounted amounts on the lines.

PO_HEADERS_ALL.table_comment: Oracle Fusion purchase-order header (canonical EBS-style name). The _ALL suffix means MULTI-ORG: holds every business unit's POs — always scope by PRC_BU_ID. One row per PO. Don't count CANCEL_FLAG = 'Y' rows as spend. NOTE: under BICC/FDI the physical object is named differently (e.g. PurchaseOrderHeaderExtractPVO) — see the <customer>-oracle-fusion-glossary physical->canonical mapping.

columns.PO_HEADER_ID: Primary key of the PO header. Join target for PO_LINES_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID.
columns.PRC_BU_ID: Procurement business unit (Fusion BU approx. EBS Operating Unit). REQUIRED scope filter — summing without it mixes orgs across the _ALL table.
columns.SEGMENT1: The human-readable PO number (document number), not a COA segment. Distinct from GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.SEGMENT1.
columns.TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE: PO type: STANDARD / BLANKET (BPA) / CONTRACT / PLANNED.
columns.CLOSED_CODE: Close status (OPEN / CLOSED / FINALLY CLOSED). Respect when computing open commitments.
columns.CURRENCY_CODE: Document currency. Convert via GL_DAILY_RATES before summing across currencies.
